title: Replace 3 dashboards with App Ecosystem + App Leaderboard
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Charting the hive
gist.blurb: We've completely revamped our internal dashboards to better track the amazing apps built on Pollinations. Say hello to the new App Ecosystem and Leaderboard views, giving us a crystal-clear picture of how the hive is growing.
gist.summary: Replaced legacy observability dashboards with comprehensive App Ecosystem and App Leaderboard views, powered by a daily Tinybird sync from the community app directory.
gist.impact: This gives the core team much better visibility into app usage, developer rankings, and ecosystem health without relying on hardcoded categories.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) and the Monitor Robot analyzing data. The robot's screen face shows a rising chart, while Polly holds a tiny clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a rising bar chart, while the tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
